mission.title: Install and Configure Langflow
mission.description: Langflow is a powerful platform for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows. It provides a visual authoring experience and built-in API servers, making it suitable for developers looking to integrate AI workflows into applications. Key trade-offs include the need for Kubernetes expertise and potential resource overhead.

steps.title: Install the CLI
steps.description:
This step installs the Langflow CLI tool, which is necessary for managing your Langflow deployments.

```bash

pip install langflow==1.8.0

```

> Ensure you have Python 3.10-3.13 installed.

steps.title: Create a Kubernetes Cluster
steps.description:
This command creates a new GKE cluster with the specified version and node count.

```bash

gcloud container clusters create langflow-cluster --cluster-version=1.30 --num-nodes=3 --region=us-central1

```

> Adjust region and node count as necessary.

steps.title: Set Up Kubeconfig
steps.description:
This command configures your local kubeconfig to use the newly created cluster.

```bash

gcloud container clusters get-credentials langflow-cluster --region us-central1

```

> This allows kubectl to interact with your cluster.
commands: gcloud container clusters get-credentials langflow-cluster --region us-central1

steps.title: Verify Cluster Nodes
steps.description:
This command checks the status of the nodes in your cluster to ensure they are running.

```bash

kubectl get nodes

```

> You should see all nodes in 'Ready' status.

steps.title: Post-Install Configuration
steps.description:
This step sets up monitoring and autoscaling for your Langflow deployment.

```bash

kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/langflow-ai/langflow/main/deploy/monitoring.yaml

kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/langflow-ai/langflow/main/deploy/autoscaling.yaml

```

> This configures monitoring for your Langflow instance.
> This enables autoscaling for your deployment.

uninstall.title: Uninstall Langflow
uninstall.description:
This command removes the Langflow deployment and all associated resources. Be aware that this will result in data loss.

```bash

kubectl delete deployment langflow

gcloud container clusters delete langflow-cluster --region us-central1 --quiet

```

> This deletes the Langflow deployment.
> This deletes the entire cluster and all resources.
commands: gcloud container clusters delete langflow-cluster --region us-central1 --quiet

upgrade.title: Upgrade Langflow
upgrade.description:
Before upgrading, ensure you back up your data. This process includes draining nodes, upgrading, and verifying the upgrade.

```bash

kubectl drain <node-name> --ignore-daemonsets --delete-local-data

kubectl set image deployment/langflow langflow=registry.k8s.io/langflow/langflow:1.8.0

kubectl uncordon <node-name>

kubectl get pods

```

> Replace <node-name> with the actual node name.
> This upgrades the Langflow deployment.
> Replace <node-name> with the actual node name to allow scheduling.
> Verify that all pods are running successfully after the upgrade.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'ImagePullBackOff'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The specified image does not exist or is not accessible.

**Fix:**
Check the image name and ensure it is available in the specified registry.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'CrashLoopBackOff'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The application is failing to start due to misconfiguration or missing dependencies.

**Fix:**
Check the application logs with 'kubectl logs <pod-name>' for more details.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'NodeNotReady'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** One or more nodes are not in a ready state, possibly due to resource constraints.

**Fix:**
Check node status with 'kubectl get nodes' and investigate resource usage.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'FailedScheduling'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** There are insufficient resources available to schedule the pod.

**Fix:**
Ensure that your cluster has enough resources or adjust resource requests in your deployment.

versionNotes.changes: Added support for new AI models, improved visual builder interface, and enhanced API capabilities.
versionNotes.migrationSteps: Update any integrations using deprecated API endpoints to the new versions.

resolution.summary: You should see output similar to 'NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION' with all nodes in 'Ready' status when running 'kubectl get nodes'.
codeSnippets: gcloud container clusters get-credentials langflow-cluster --region us-central1

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have the necessary tools and resources before starting the installation.
